pages.title: Glock Stock
pages.text: The installed Glock definition accepts the Glock Stock attachment. It also supports handgun sights, SMG muzzle attachments, and Glock 17 skins.

pages.title: Fitting Equipment
pages.text: Use the configured Attachment Mode control to manage compatible parts. Use Switch Scope when a fitted optic provides more than one viewing state.$(br2)If a part is rejected, trust the live compatibility shown by PointBlank rather than forcing a visually similar attachment.

pages.title: Arms Dealer Workstation
pages.text: PointBlank's workstation supports its broader equipment loop. Use JEI and the in-world interface for pack-specific recipes that are not standard crafting recipes.
